privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a survey titled 'Site Safety Induction Exam 2024' in LimeSurvey with a question group 'OSHA Compliance' containing 4 mandatory assessment questions on OSHA safety rules. Q1 about danger sign colors (Red=correct, value 1). Q2 about fall protection height requirement (6 feet=correct, value 1). Q3 about workplace safety responsibility (Everyone on site=correct, value 1). Q4 about damaged ladder handling (Tag it Do Not Use and report it=correct, value 1). Two assessment rules must be configured: score 0-3 displays 'FAIL - Retraining Required' message; score 4 displays 'PASS - Induction Complete' message. The survey must have assessment mode enabled and be activated. Data is synthetic, created during task execution in LimeSurvey.
